top_signals.title: Trump pivots to midterms, affordability after China summit as Iran war persists
top_signals.summary: Trump, at a White House event Monday, is expected to announce an expansion of the number of discounted prescription drugs offered through TrumpRX.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Grafana refuses to pay ransom after codebase theft
top_signals.summary: On Saturday night, the company released a statement confirming the incident and outlining their decision not to pay a ransom issued by the hackers behind the attack.
